judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the successful query (call_LxAfWQkkNQOgc3rpZIqChoJa), the agent computed sales using QuoteLineItem and OpportunityLineItem in the sales_pipeline database rather than using Order/OrderItem from products_orders as required by the Sales Amount Policy, leading to the wrong agent Id.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent aggregated sales by joining all OrderItems to Orders from any accounts that had a contract signed in the last five months (calls call_ebt2NYJTuPDdlUX7Kbk5JYbv, call_9FDrrmMIlsYFylFuy0qNOOzp, call_3dX2RG3AgOfUtXc6vDDebYpc, and execute_python call_SnwJtJbVt4Ihr8dhVxwG8Htr), instead of filtering Orders by their EffectiveDate within the last five months (and/or properly linking to the specific associated contract/opportunity), thus using the wrong set of orders and returning the wrong agent.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step, the agent aggregated sales across all orders without filtering to the past five months and without linking orders to eligible opportunities/contracts as required by the policy, despite earlier retrieving Contract and Opportunity data, and thus returned the wrong agent.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent incorrectly linked orders to opportunities by assuming Order.Id equals Opportunity.Id (setting orders['opp_like_id'] = orders['o_id'] and filtering by eligible_opps), resulting in no eligible orders and returning null instead of identifying the top agent.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
